basics.name: Sarthak Chittawar
basics.label: Undergraduate Researcher at IIIT Hyderabad
basics.summary: Computer Science and Engineering student at IIIT Hyderabad working on mobile robotics, computer vision, NLP, and machine learning systems. Undergraduate researcher at the Robotics Research Centre advised by Prof. K. Madhava Krishna.

work.summary: NLP, computer vision, document intelligence, and hyperspectral satellite modeling in Bengaluru, Karnataka.
highlights: Engineered an end-to-end pipeline for extracting unstructured tabular data from PDFs into accurate CSVs, improving significantly on previous work.
Developed QA and summary models using RAG-based few-shot prompting on an SQL backbone for user interaction.
Worked on methane emission rate prediction from hyperspectral satellite data and local wind speeds by fine-tuning the Prithvi-V1-100 model.
Received a pre-placement offer after completing the internship.

work.summary: Mobile robotics and computer vision research advised by Prof. K. Madhava Krishna.
highlights: Worked on MASt3R-guided topological navigation and pixel-relative representations.
Published research on topological navigation at IEEE ICRA 2026 and IEEE/RSJ IROS 2026.

work.summary: Computer vision and PyTorch internship in Hyderabad, Telangana.
highlights: Developed a YOLO-based framework for detecting defects in electric power lines.
Built model architecture components from scratch and managed data preprocessing and training.

education.institution: International Institute of Information Technology, Hyderabad

publications.name: PixelLoop: Shortcut Topological Navigation with Pixel-Level Loops
publications.publisher: IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
publications.summary: Shortcut topological navigation using pixel-level loop closures.

publications.name: MASt3R-Nav: WayPixel Navigation in Relative 3D Maps
publications.publisher: IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
publications.summary: WayPixel navigation in relative 3D maps for geometrically grounded robot navigation.

publications.name: Towards Global Localization using Multi-Modal Object-Instance Re-Identification
publications.summary: Multimodal object-instance re-identification using RGB and depth for robust localization.

projects.name: Medmini
projects.summary: Lightweight LLM-based medical data answering system for edge devices.
highlights: Designed for less than 3 GB RAM, 0 VRAM, and sub-3-second inference.
Deployed through the Android Expo Go app.
Awarded 2nd place by Qualcomm at Megathon 2023.

projects.name: Image Style Transfer using Transformers
projects.summary: Enhanced a CVPR 2022 transformer-based style transfer architecture with content-aware positional encoding.
highlights: Integrated CLIP for text-based image retrieval.
Used optical flow for video style transfer.

projects.name: Fast Inference using Speculative Decoding
projects.summary: Implemented speculative decoding with knowledge distillation to improve inference times for translation and generation tasks.
highlights: Improved on the baseline with online speculative decoding between draft and target models.

projects.name: A Study in Mechanistic Interpretability - Grokking
projects.summary: Studied mechanistic interpretability and AI safety through grokking experiments on a toy language model.

awards.title: 2nd place at Megathon 2023
awards.summary: Awarded for Medmini at Hyderabad's largest student hackathon.

awards.title: All India Rank 3887 in JEE Main
